Class SystematicNBodyBenchmark

java.lang.Object
org.episteme.benchmarks.benchmark.benchmarks.SystematicNBodyBenchmark
All Implemented Interfaces:
SystematicBenchmark<NBodyProvider>, RunnableBenchmark
@AutoService(RunnableBenchmark.class) public class SystematicNBodyBenchmark extends Object implements SystematicBenchmark<NBodyProvider>
A benchmark that systematically tests all available NBodyAlgorithmProviders.
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Specified by:
      getId in interface RunnableBenchmark
      Returns:
      A unique stable identifier for this benchmark (e.g. "ga-tsp-50")

    • run

      public void run()
      Description copied from interface: RunnableBenchmark
      The core action to measure. This method will be called repeatedly in a loop.
